title: Apply an already-existing label
description: Closes an evidence gap left by labels-due-date-combo, which only tests the just-created-label path (agent creates the label and immediately carries its fresh id forward). This scenario seeds the label ahead of time via `setup`, so the agent must find-then-apply an already-existing label it does not already have the id for -- the harder path the parked label-ensure composite was evaluated against.
promptTemplate: There is already a label called "{{prefix}}existing-tag" in this Vikunja instance. Create a project called "{{prefix}}Existing Label Project" with 3 tasks, and apply the existing "{{prefix}}existing-tag" label (do not create a new label) to all 3 tasks.
